## Closes
<!-- GitHub only auto-closes a linked issue on merge when the PR body contains
     one of these literal keywords. Prose like "Pairs with #123" does NOT work.
     Accepted (case-insensitive, optional colon):
       Close / Closes / Closed
       Fix / Fixes / Fixed
       Resolve / Resolves / Resolved
     Followed by: #N or owner/repo#N.
     Cross-repo does NOT auto-close — it only creates a mention. To auto-close
     cross-repo, open the PR in the repo that owns the issue.
     Replace [ISSUE_NUMBER] below with the actual number, or the CI check fails. -->
Closes #[ISSUE_NUMBER]
